textByHashes.894eeb722401b6145775a7fefcf8ed418278b1e0: Hello! The name's Kit. Sir Kit Breaker.
textByHashes.afba54506e7cba73e4bc5def6174bd050e2169f6: Thank you! I chose it myself!
textByHashes.59282a1f542a5214e8b88901715fc8b0b77750c6: I'm helping Gilbert with a project of his, on behalf of the White knights. It will take us a while but I can let you know when we're closer to completion!
textByHashes.c5879d1cf97def1d60de0beba2eedbf680d73367: It's going well, thank you. Being on loan to Gilbert and the Glade project is giving me good purpose whilst I do all the basic training.
textByHashes.fe89dd878fe735665d9a1bdf283582cc79f40cc3: Not yet at least, until we get started on the land. For now it's mostly tending to the flowers and wandering... Patrolling around!
textByHashes.6bf3c760fadac0a4016774a81849e7b2e7e9e4f6: I can't thank you enough, . I hope you'll pop by one day as the Glade project progresses. Don't be a stranger!
